'''Kirrek''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]]. It was the site of two important battles: a [[Battle of Kirrek (Unification Wars)|first]] during the [[Unification Wars (Koros)/Legends|Unification Wars]] and a [[Battle of Kirrek (Great Hyperspace War)|later one]] the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]. In the former, it was the last world to fall to [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Teta/Legends|Teta]]. In the latter, it was attacked by the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]], which was easily repelled by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

After the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] seized power in the [[Star system/Legends|system]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], Kirrek remained loyal to the deposed [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Keto]]. As a result, [[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal Keto]] ordered the destruction of three [[City/Legends|cities]] on Kirrek.

The planet boasted a highly advanced population which survived, for the most part, off Kirrek's abundant plant life.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places Kirrek in the Quelli sector (a misspelling of the true [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]]) of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].
